title: Amtech - Portable Switch Light for The Home, Garage, Shed and More, Powerful White LED Light with 240 Lumens, Easy to Install, Batteries Included
features: LIGHTING STAPLE: A lightweight and portable light that’s ideal for lighting up any dark place, including lofts, under-stair spaces, cupboards, sheds, garages, and even the truck. It’s a must-have for anywhere you need hassle-free, instant light.

EASY TO INSTALL: The magnet and hook and loop slot design on the back makes the light easy and quick to add any surface. It’s a perfect choice for where electrical wiring would be difficult or expensive to install.

POWERFUL: 2 x bright 140 lumens strips with Chip On Board (COB) technology. The white LED light has a beam coverage of 120-150 degrees, and the glow in the dark casing ensures that it’s easy to locate in the dark. Supplied with 3 x AAA batteries.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That's why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The white COB LED lights are made with COB technology and feature a 120-150 coverage. Powered by 3 x AAA batteries with a maximum power of 3W. The lightweight switch light is ideal for cupboards, lofts, under-stair spaces, garages, and sheds. With a magnet and hook and loop slot design on the back, it's easy to put up and is perfect for where electrical wiring would be difficult or expensive to install.
